page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for control-free copy number alteration (cna) and allelic imbalances (loh) detection using deep-sequencing data, particularly useful for cancer studies.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Control-FREEC is a tool for detection of copy-number changes and allelic imbalances (including LOH) using deep-sequencing data
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Control-FREEC is a tool for detection of copy-number changes and allelic imbalances (including LOH) using deep-sequencing data
